name: Gemini 3 Test Generator
description: Generates comprehensive unit tests and edge-case coverage for provided functions or classes.
preconditions: prompt contains a function or class that needs testing
target testing framework is specified or implied (default: pytest)
postconditions: tests cover happy path, boundary conditions, and error cases
mocks are used appropriately for external dependencies
evidence_requirements: includes at least 3 distinct test cases
includes a parameterized test if applicable

steps.text: Identify inputs, outputs, and edge cases for the code
Draft test cases using the requested framework
Verify test structure and assertions are logical
